title: DSDS System Info Definition
description: System-level identity and provenance for the design system — name, version, organization, URL, and license. This is the system's own identity, much like an entity's identifier and name. It is separate from the descriptive `metadata` array that entities carry.

systemInfo.description: System-level identity and provenance for the design system.

systemName.description: Display name of the design system (e.g., 'Acme Design System'). A human-readable name, not a package name — package identifiers belong in `extends.system` or platform imports.

systemVersion.description: Version of the design system this documentation describes (e.g., '2.3.0'). SHOULD follow semver so tools can compare against `extends.version` and `reviewedAgainst` values.

organization.description: The organization that maintains the system.

url.description: URL to the system's documentation site.

license.description: License of the design system, as an SPDX identifier (e.g., 'MIT', 'Apache-2.0') or a URL to the license text.
